OmniScript.description: Omniscript to capture Tobacco & Vapour Retailer Information from operator portal
OmniScript.name: PHOCS Tobacco & Vapour Retailer Information

omniProcessElements.name: GetPortalUserAccount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Get Portal User Account Details", "bundle" : "DMExtractLogInUserId", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "userId", "inputParam" : "captureId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: TextBlock13
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock13", "text" : "

Thank you. Your application has been submitted successfully.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: PHOCSAcknowledgement
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Acknowledgement", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "", "previousWidth" : "0", "nextLabel" : "", "nextWidth" : "0", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "ariaLevel" : 2, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: PHOCSApplicationDescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Description", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: TextBlock2
